description_long: This is a vintage-style green flatbed truck with a boxy cab and open wooden cargo bed. The cab features a single front windshield, two side mirrors, and a simple, utilitarian design with visible steering wheel and levers. The front end has two round headlights, a curved fender, and a prominent grille. The cargo area is constructed with vertical wooden slats and a flat wooden floor, suitable for transporting goods. The wheels are large and spoked, with the front wheels slightly smaller than the rear. The overall appearance suggests an early 20th-century utility vehicle, likely used for deliveries or light transport in an urban setting.
description: A vintage green flatbed truck with a boxy cab, open wooden cargo bed, and large spoked wheels, reminiscent of early 20th-century utility vehicles.
description_view_0: Front view showing the boxy cab, windshield, two round headlights, and curved fender.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the open wooden cargo bed, spoked wheels, and visible steering wheel inside the cab.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open cargo bed with wooden slats and the back of the cab.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the cargo bed, wheels, and cab interior.
attribute_headlight_design: dual round headlights, symmetrically placed on either side of the front grille
